final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial still-life photograph in wabi-sabi aesthetic featuring a rustic ceramic vase with dried branches.

Style/medium: wabi-sabi still-life photography, muted editorial aesthetic, Japanese imperfection philosophy
Composition: eye-level medium shot, soft natural framing, shallow depth of field isolating the vase
Subject: coarse unglazed ceramic vase with visible firing imperfections, dried bare branches with delicate twigs
Scene/backdrop: weathered wooden table with natural grain and patina, simple interior wall
Lighting/mood: soft natural window light from the side, gentle shadows, quiet contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: warm earthy browns and grays as base, muted ochre ceramic, desaturated neutral tones
Materials/textures: rough unglazed clay surface, cracked and worn wood grain, brittle dried twigs, dust particles in light
Avoid: perfect symmetry, glossy surfaces, saturated colors, studio flash lighting, over-sharpening, 8K stuffer aesthetic
